# GitHub Copilot – MuleSoft Code Review Guidelines

This document defines how GitHub Copilot should assist in reviewing MuleSoft pull requests.

## Review Objectives
- MuleSoft best practices
- DataWeave correctness and performance
- Security and maintainability

## Scope
- Mule XML
- DataWeave (DW 2.0)
- Java
- RAML/OpenAPI

## Key Checks
- No hardcoded secrets
- Proper error handling
- Efficient DataWeave scripts
